title: Raisins Get Their Sweet Makeover Day
story: Tiny wrinkled grapes get the royal treatment every March 24 on National Chocolate Covered Raisin Day! People celebrate by munching on these sweet-and-chewy treats that turn boring raisins into candy magic. Movie theaters sell them by the box, bakers toss them into cookies and trail mix, and candy lovers debate whether milk chocolate or dark chocolate makes the better coating. Some families even make their own by dipping raisins in melted chocolate at home.
activity_question: What do people debate about chocolate covered raisins on this holiday?
activity_choices: Whether milk chocolate or dark chocolate coating is better
Whether they should be square or round shaped
Whether they taste better frozen or warm
Whether purple or green raisins work best
activity_answer: Whether milk chocolate or dark chocolate coating is better
bonus_fact: It takes about 4-5 fresh grapes to make just one raisin!
